findings.description: A stray PDF page number 'Page 2 of 5' is inserted into the HTML body flow as a <footer> element between the Attachments section and the final address footer. The PDF has page numbers on pages 2–5, but only 'Page 2 of 5' was retained in the HTML, placed incorrectly at the end of the document. This is PDF page-footer content inserted mid-body.
findings.evidence:
HTML contains:

Page 2 of 5

placed after Section IV (Attachments) and before the agency address footer. Pages 3–5 page numbers ('Page 3 of 5', 'Page 4 of 5', 'Page 5 of 5') were correctly stripped, but 'Page 2 of 5' was left in.
